contributors.name: Pastorsimon1798
contributors.note: Same person as Simon, earlier git identity

work_patterns.pattern: Evening sessions build features; mornings fix, test, and document

eras.name: The Seed
eras.author: Pastorsimon1798
eras.description: Kai agent builds entire scaffolding in one evening (29 task-jobs)
key_events: Kai agent runs 27 task-jobs building full architecture
First LLM integration: 'Fix Atelier LLM integration - WORKING' (Mar 1)
eras.narrative_arc: An AI agent named Kai scaffolds the entire project in one evening — 29 commits implementing everything from PromiseDetector to RalphLoop

eras.name: The Explosion
eras.author: Pastorsimon1798 + Simon
eras.description: Cursor IDE agent writes 15 commits in 6 minutes; project renamed Atelier → Liminal
key_events: 4 new creative coding generators (noise/flow fields, GLSL, Three.js, LLM music)
eras.narrative_arc: A single day transforms everything — Cursor IDE writes code at machine speed, the project finds its identity as 'Liminal', and a major intelligence layer is merged

eras.name: The Great Consolidation
eras.author: Simon
eras.description: Taming chaos; Compost Mill metaphor emerges
key_events: Removed inception/anthropic providers, migrated to LIMINAL_* env vars
Prompt system overhauled to 27 registered prompts (v2.0.0)
Compost Mill design document written (4:50 PM)
Compost CLI, LLM integration, seed injection wired (7:36 PM)
eras.narrative_arc: The developer spends the entire day taming the previous night's chaos. The Compost Mill metaphor emerges — treating code and creative material as organic matter

eras.name: Quality Crusade
eras.author: Simon + Kyanite (merge)
eras.description: Forensic audit, RalphLoop decomposed, LIR built
key_events: Deep audit unification — wire all feedback loops
Red team audit — migrate to Vitest, fix 47+ code defects
PR #2 merged: forensic audit (6 critical bugs, eliminate all `any` types)
RalphLoop decomposed: 1185 → 377 lines, split into 8 focused modules
LIR system built: error classes, core types, token factory, parsers
GLM-powered PR review CI workflow added
eras.narrative_arc: Quality becomes the obsession — audits, decomposition, and the birth of a structured code analysis system (LIR)

eras.name: The Conversational Turn
eras.author: Simon
eras.description: Chat system, Art Brain, creative capabilities engine
key_events: Chat types, CreativeBrief, InterviewPhase, ConversationManager built
IP liability fix (removed real artist names)
eras.narrative_arc: The system becomes conversational — an interview-based creative partner that learns preferences and proactively suggests ideas

eras.name: The Quiet
eras.author: n/a
eras.narrative_arc: The seed germinates in darkness. Four days of silence between the conversational turn and the multimedia explosion

eras.name: Multimedia Expansion
eras.author: Simon
eras.description: Video, audio, aesthetic critics, music theory, evolution engine
key_events: Remotion video pipeline (types, templates, generator, renderer)
Aesthetic system: color harmony, layout, typography, sound harmony critics
Audio system: Meyda feature extractor, pitchfinder, timbre extractor
Evolution engine: FitnessCombiner, N-dim MapElites, PerlinNoise
Music theory engine: euclidean rhythms, Markov chains
eras.narrative_arc: A two-day burst of multimedia ambition — video, audio, aesthetic criticism, music theory, and evolutionary computation all appear simultaneously

eras.name: The Dogfood Crucible
eras.author: Simon
key_events: REAL CreativeEvaluator scores for all dogfood examples
BRUTALLY HONEST dogfood page showing only working examples
Comprehensive security hardening — red team audit remediation
Harness TUI following Claw Code pattern
Natural language interface — Claude Code style
eras.narrative_arc: The developer runs the system against itself, publishing brutally honest results. Then builds a self-improving harness that observes its own failures and rewrites its own code

eras.name: THE BIBLE
eras.author: Simon
eras.description: Sacred documentation, persistent memory, plugin system, TUI streaming
key_events: NO DUPLICATION rule — prevent wheel reinvention
HarnessMemory, Model Tier detection, tier-based prompt building
TUI streaming with think tag handling
Rich activity monitoring with phase indicators
eras.narrative_arc: The final day establishes THE_BIBLE as sacred documentation, adds persistent memory, a plugin system, and streaming TUI — 44 commits in a single day

kai_agent.description: Automated scaffolding agent that built the initial architecture

cursor_ide.description: Cursor IDE agent generating code at machine speed

evidence: Reference to 'Claude Code style' natural language interface
